e.g. Tart and sweet, typical of ripe strawberries

e.g. Chunky pieces should pass through a 6.0 mm straw
e.g. Free from foreign material, including insect and rodent damage
e.g. Machine pitted. Not to exceed more than one pit per 20 lb.
e.g. Strawberries 70%, Water 25%, Sugar 5%
